description:
The libdnf-plugin-subscription-manager package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install libdnf-plugin-subscription-manager
rationale:
This package provides plugins to interact with repositories and subscriptions
from the Red Hat entitlement platform; contains subscription-manager and
product-id plugins.
ocil_clause: the libdnf-plugin-subscription-manager package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the libdnf-plugin-subscription-manager package is installed: 
$ rpm -q libdnf-plugin-subscription-manager
title: Install libdnf-plugin-subscription-manager Package
